title: Conditionals Arena: 1st, 2nd, and 3rd
description: Master all conditional forms from Unit 10: A Fair World.

questions.question: Which sentence shows a 3rd conditional (imagining a different past)?
options: If you work hard, you will earn a bonus.
If I had more time, I would learn Aborigine survival skills.
If the pilot had seen the flock of birds, he would have avoided the collision.
questions.hint: The 3rd conditional uses 'if + past perfect' and 'would have + past participle'.

questions.question: Choose the correct verbs to complete the conditional sentences:

statements.text: If we buy Fair Trade chocolate, we [will support] small farmers.
If I was the manager, I [would support] organic products.
If you had told me about the issue, I [would have supported] your decision.

questions.question: Complete the conditional sentences with the correct verb form:
questions.text:
1. If you [help] (help) me, we will finish the project today.
2. If he [had] (have) a car, he would drive to Dublin.
3. If they had checked the weather forecast, they [would have known] (know) about the storm.
4. If we don't protect the environment, we [will lose] (lose) beautiful species.
